opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I'm passing shards of glass every time I go to the toilet, and I can't leave the bathroom.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden burning and constant urge to wee started today and it's agony.

symptom_narrative.character: burning on passing urine, urgency and frequency, suprapubic heaviness, cloudy malodorous urine
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: like passing glass; going every 15 minutes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: cloudy smelly urine; NO fever/chills/rigors, no back/flank (loin) pain, no nausea/vomiting, no vaginal discharge/irritation; not pregnant that I know of; first UTI

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; otherwise healthy non-pregnant woman

objective_data_offered.value: burning, urgency, frequency (every ~15 min), suprapubic heaviness, cloudy malodorous urine
no fever/chills, no loin/back pain, no nausea/vomiting, no vaginal discharge
